code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut found = false
  mut answer = ""
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      if not found
        let trimmed = string.trim(line)
        if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
          answer = trimmed
          found = true
        end
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  if found
    println(answer)
  else
    println("(none)")
  end
end
